name: commit-commands
description: Streamline git commit, push, pull request, and stale branch cleanup workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Git commit, push, PR, and stale branch cleanup commands.
interface.longDescription: A Codex adaptation of Anthropic's commit-commands plugin. It provides /commit, /commit-push-pr, and /clean_gone workflows, and appends Codex co-author attribution to generated commits and PR descriptions.
defaultPrompt: When using commit-commands, preserve the repository's commit style, avoid committing secrets, and append Codex attribution with: Co-authored-by: Codex <noreply@openai.com>.
